description:
As an HR administrator
  I want to manage employee records
  So that the organization can keep up‑to‑date personnel information

steps.name: Given the user is logged into the HR system
the user is logged into the HR system
the user is logged in with valid credentials
the user is on the Orange HRM login page
the user enters Admin in the username field
the user enters admin123 in the password field
the user clicks the Login button
the user should see the welcome message
And the user navigates to the "viewEmployeeList" page
the user navigates to the {string} page
When the user navigates to the employee details page for "<EmployeeID>"
the user navigates to the employee details page for <EmployeeID>
And the user clicks the "Edit" button
the user clicks the Edit button
And the user updates the email to "<NewEmail>"
the user updates the email to {string}
And the user clicks the "Save" button
